# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
|---------|--------------------|
| latest  | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Instead, please report them via [GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting](https://github.com/135yshr/md2pdf/security/advisories/new).

Include the following information:

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (if any)

You should receive a response within 7 days. We will work with you to understand and address the issue before any public disclosure.

## Scope

This project executes external processes (`mmdc`, `python3`, `chromium`). If you discover a way to exploit the interaction with these tools, please report it.
